message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

participant "LoaderPlugin" as LP
participant "ContentServer" as CS
participant "FS" as FS

LP -> CS : LoadBundleIndexes()

activate CS

loop [for each index file]
  CS -> FS : ReadFile()
  FS --> CS
  CS -> CS : parse ContentBundleIndex instances, fill mountpoint mappings
end loop

deactivate CS

CS --> LP

@enduml
